vocab.meaning: tiếng lách cách của dao kéo, thìa dĩa
vocab.example: Every morning, the clatter of cutlery from the kitchen downstairs acts as my secondary alarm clock.

vocab.meaning: tiếng kêu rì rì của các thiết bị gia dụng
vocab.example: Late at night, the constant low-level hum of appliances like the refrigerator becomes surprisingly noticeable.

vocab.meaning: tiếng ầm ì xa xăm (thường là sấm hoặc xe cộ)
vocab.example: I can often hear the distant rumble of the heavy freight trains passing through the outskirts of the town.
The shrill whistle of the kettle is a familiar sound that signals my afternoon tea break.

vocab.meaning: tiếng ồn xây dựng hỗn tạp, chói tai
vocab.example: Living in a developing area means dealing with cacophonous construction noise from early morning until dusk.
One of the few pleasant noises I hear is the gentle patter of rain against my windowpane during the monsoon season.

vocab.meaning: tiếng rít cao vút (thường là phanh xe hoặc bản lề cửa)
vocab.example: The rusty gate in my backyard emits a high-pitched squeal every time the wind blows a bit too hard.

vocab.meaning: tiếng nói chuyện rì rầm, không rõ tiếng
vocab.example: From my balcony, I can hear the muffled chatter of people dining at the sidewalk cafe below.
High levels of sonic pollution from the nearby expressway make it difficult to enjoy a quiet evening in the garden.

vocab.meaning: tiếng trống bass đập thình thịch
vocab.example: The thumping bass from a neighbor's sound system can be incredibly intrusive when I'm trying to study.
